content: @dnd-kit (core+sortable+utilities) is the standard 2026 React drag-and-drop toolkit for reorderable lists, chosen over native HTML5 DnD because HTML5 DnD has poor touch/mobile support and no keyboard accessibility -- both are required here since photo reordering happens on a revendedor's phone. dnd-kit maintains 60fps even at high item counts (product photo grids are max 5 items, well within budget) and offers axis/container-locked dragging useful for a horizontal photo strip.
